NC-001.title: Dimensional nonconformance on operation OP-30
NC-001.stateMessage: Read-only prototype shell. Governed actions must remain outside this fixture.

conflict.stateMessage: Conflict detected. Offline changes must be reconciled in the governed record workflow.

partial_access.stateMessage: Partial-access fixture. Restricted sections are visible only as read-only limitations.
limitations: Investigation notes are restricted for the current role.
Signature details are masked in this fixture state.

degraded_offline.stateMessage: Degraded/offline fixture. This shell must not perform governed actions until the record is reloaded from authority.
